constraints.layout_style: nested sections with h3 headings instead of labels

required_complexity_patterns.notes: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element
Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only
Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input
Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters)
Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click

reference_templates.title: Disabled decoy field
reference_templates.notes: Disabled name field looks required but cannot be filled; active duplicate below
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Disabled decoy

reference_templates.title: Role group not fieldset
reference_templates.notes: Grouped radios use div role=group instead of fieldset
reference_templates.dom_excerpt:
Role group

Willing to relocate?

reference_templates.title: Ashby yes no buttons
reference_templates.notes: Ashby-inspired yes/no as two styled buttons instead of native radio
reference_templates.dom_excerpt:
Ashby yes no

Are you authorized to work in this country?

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element Required: Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only Required: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input Required: Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters) Required: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click Reference DOM (Disabled decoy field): Disabled name field looks required but cannot be filled; active duplicate below Reference DOM (Role group not fieldset): Grouped radios use div role=group instead of fieldset Reference DOM (Ashby yes no buttons): Ashby-inspired yes/no as two styled buttons instead of native radio Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: aria-label-only, table-layout, div-role-textbox, duplicate-name-attrs, details-accordion. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: nested sections with h3 headings instead of labels. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Disabled decoy field; Role group not fieldset; Ashby yes no buttons.
